items.name: event_attendance_checker
items.description: Is a local-first Spring Boot backend (Java 21) for tracking event attendance. It features a zero-config bootstrap that dynamically switches paths on first launch. It manages file-based multi-tenant SQLite schemas using programmatically attached databases, handles Excel reports via Apache POI, and supports real-time WebSockets.
